attempt.detail: The asymptotic-order variants of Erdős #319 (isTheta/isBigO/isLittleO) are settled: c(N)=Θ(N) with gauge g(N)=N, immediately from the trivial bound c(N)≤N plus the already-accepted Croot/Adenwalla lower bound c(N)≥(1−1/e+o(1))N. The only genuinely open content is the exact constant κ=lim c(N)/N ∈ [1−1/e,1] (conjecturally 1; the natural p-adic obstruction is only o(N), so it does not force κ<1) and the finite IsGreatest values. Exact small values verified: c(6)=4 ({1,2,3,6}), c(12)=6 ({1,2,3,4,6,12}).

caveats: A signed banked attempt. Trust is earned via its verifier_attachments + the gate, never from claimed_status.
